# Bundled Third-Party Code

TimerHUD vendors a small subset of third-party sources so it can build without
external package managers.

| File | Origin | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `cJSON.h/c` | [cJSON](https://github.com/DaveGamble/cJSON) | Lightweight C JSON parser used by the TimerHUD settings loader. |

Keep third-party updates isolated in this directory to simplify license audits.
